title: Belgium national under-15 football team

infobox.value: are a group of four teams that represents [Belgium](/wiki/Belgium "Belgium") in [association football](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") at various specific age levels, ranging from under-17 to under-21. All of the teams are controlled by [Royal Belgian Football Association](/wiki/Royal_Belgian_Football_Association "Royal Belgian Football Association"), the governing body for [football in Belgium](/wiki/Football_in_Belgium "Football in Belgium").

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

(Redirected from [Belgium national under-15 football team](/w/index.php?title=Belgium_national_under-15_football_team&redirect=no "Belgium national under-15 football team"))

![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/8/8f/Athletics_pictogram.svg/40px-Athletics_pictogram.svg.png) [![Disambiguation icon](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/8/8c/DAB_list_gray.svg/40px-DAB_list_gray.svg.png)](/wiki/File:DAB_list_gray.svg)

List of sports-related pages with the same or similar names

This article includes a list of sports-related pages with the same or similar names. If an [internal link](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Special:Whatlinkshere/Belgium_national_youth_football_team&namespace=0) for a specific sport article referred you to this page, you may wish to change the link to point directly to the intended sport article, if one exists.

The **Belgium national youth football teams** are a group of four teams that represents [Belgium](/wiki/Belgium "Belgium") in [association football](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") at various specific age levels, ranging from under-17 to under-21. All of the teams are controlled by [Royal Belgian Football Association](/wiki/Royal_Belgian_Football_Association "Royal Belgian Football Association"), the governing body for [football in Belgium](/wiki/Football_in_Belgium "Football in Belgium").

The four teams are the following:

* [Belgium national under-21 football team](/wiki/Belgium_national_under-21_football_team "Belgium national under-21 football team")
* [Belgium national under-19 football team](/wiki/Belgium_national_under-19_football_team "Belgium national under-19 football team")
* [Belgium national under-18 football team](/wiki/Belgium_national_under-18_football_team "Belgium national under-18 football team")
* [Belgium national under-17 football team](/wiki/Belgium_national_under-17_football_team "Belgium national under-17 football team")
